name: mediaplay
description: Standalone client-side audio/video player for the browser: plays your file's bytes directly, remuxes in memory when the browser can't (no re-encode), and renders embedded and external subtitles including styled ASS. No server, no upload.

scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:demo && start-server-and-test 'vite preview --port 5173 --strictPort' http://localhost:5173 'cypress run --browser chrome'
